positive: Minimalist geometric celestial map print featuring stylized constellation lines connecting simple glowing orbs. The design is centered and highly symmetrical, composed of deep indigo and nebula purple gradients contrasted with bright, clean gold line work and accents. The style should be sophisticated, retro-futurism, inspired by mid-century modern art and scientific blueprints. Emphasize strong, graphic silhouettes against a dark background, ensuring clean lines suitable for fabric printing. Include subtle elements like stylized lunar phases and intersecting orbital paths. High detail, vector graphic quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
